shared_properties: Project core palette keeps primary #535353, background #F7F7F7, and accent #FF0000.
Canvas target stays 600x150px with pixel-perfect presentation at 60 FPS.
All painted edges keep a 2px outline rhythm and flat shading.
differences: The prompt uses a smaller 12px text scale than the game-over title.
The phrase instructs the player to press SPACE for restart.
The text is designed for optional blink toggling in runtime rather than baked motion.

context.usage: Lower fail-state prompt that appears below the main game-over label and waits for restart input.

shape.silhouette: Single centered sentence reading PRESS SPACE TO RESTART with compact 12px pixel lettering.

acceptance_criteria: The phrase PRESS SPACE TO RESTART remains fully legible at 1x scale with all letters contained inside the frame.
Only #535353 and transparency appear in painted pixels.
